3219760.name: The Almamula
3219760.description:
You've arrived in Aycha, a strange, wild, and uncharted land, with a mission: to drive out the curse that haunts the plains. On your journey, you’ll face both the raw forces of nature and the mythical unknown. Rumor has it that the tall grass hides not only animals but also mysterious creatures like the Luces Malas and the Gualichos.

But you don’t have to go it alone. Team up with friends to form a settlement where you can rest, craft your own gear, and regain your strength. Together, you can build a home or a pulpería for food and drinks, and forge tools to survive in this unfamiliar land.

  • Explore a vast world divided into four biomes: the calm Pampas Grasslands, the Patagonian Steppe, the cold Monte, and the shadowy Chaco Forest.

  • A combat system inspired by Esgrima Criolla, featuring facón and poncho.

  • Face the unknown solo or with friends in co-op multiplayer.

  • Build your base: from a mud house to recover your strength, to a forge for upgrading your gear, or a pulpería to share stories by the salamandra (wood stove).

  • Craft your own equipment: weapons, armor, tools, and gadgets that enhance your rosary’s abilities.

  • Battle numerous bosses and creatures inspired by Argentine folklore.

  • Dance traditional folklore and chacarera using the emote system.
3219760.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙语 - 西班牙

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
